visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair and a pink t-shirt wearing yellow and orange protective overalls with thick black straps addresses the camera directly with an intense, wide-eyed expression. He is standing in a brightly lit, minimalist indoor space with pristine white walls and light-colored wooden flooring. (2) The scene cuts to a young woman with her hair styled in two playful buns, wearing a light-beige oversized hoodie. She looks upward with a joyous expression, clasping her hands together in front of her face as if celebrating or making a wish, against the same white-walled background. (3) The creator, now wearing a blue and white vertically striped button-down shirt over a white undershirt, stands in a modern hallway with light-beige floor-to-ceiling cabinets. He gestures expansively with both hands while talking to a woman with long wavy dark hair wearing a black cropped sweatshirt. (4) A wide establishing shot reveals a spacious living area featuring a large, curved white sectional sofa adorned with patterned pillows. A low wooden coffee table sits on a plush white rug, and large windows with sheer white curtains let in ample natural light, creating a bright and airy atmosphere. (5) The camera captures a close-up of a unique mushroom-shaped wall lamp that emits a warm, soft glow against a cream-colored wall. This is followed by a shot of the master bedroom, which features a large bed with a white headboard and striking deep orange/red floor-to-ceiling curtains. (6) The three individuals gather in the living room, standing near a dining table with wooden chairs. They engage in animated conversation, with the woman in the black sweatshirt pointing toward the ceiling to highlight a design feature, while the others look on with smiles and laughter.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我們今天要來恭喜我們的 hahababy 的總監 羅禁慾 羅小姐 正式加入我們的 房貸少年團 耶. [Variety]: 房貸少年團. (2) [Subtitle]: 耶. [Variety]: 耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 耶. (4) [Subtitle]: 你們這個室內幾坪 室內實坪大概多少. (5) [Subtitle]: 20 幾啦 應該是 20 我記得 23 24 左右. [Variety]: 23、24 坪. (6) [Variety]: 超大的玄關. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且還有一個這個玄關算大喔. (8) [Subtitle]: 很舒服的玄關 這像什麼什麼七八十坪的大玄關. (9) [Variety]: 寬敞的客廳. (10) [Variety]: 300 多公分的沙發. (11) [Subtitle]: 很大捏 這個 300 多公分很大喔 而且放下去就剛剛好. (12) [Subtitle]: 你旁邊再放一個邊几都可以啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後這個電視的距離跟沙發的距離也是夠的不錯. (14) [Subtitle]: 我看完他這個之後我就覺得 哇塞 單身女生的房子真的好好喔 就不用考慮說小孩會弄髒 小孩會撞到 小孩會怎樣. [Variety]: 小孩會弄髒 小孩會撞到 小孩會怎樣. (15) [Variety]: (偷抱怨?). (16) [Variety]: 主臥. (17) [Subtitle]: 你這邊主臥這一面牆有做整個衣櫃已經釘死了. (18) [Subtitle]: 窗簾的顏色很敢用欸. (19) [Subtitle]: 豬肝紅. (20) [Subtitle]: 差不多. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊還有一個可愛的小龜頭你看. [Variety]: 可愛的小龜頭??. (22) [Variety]: 小蘑菇!!!. (23) [Variety]: 很有設計感的天花板. (24) [Subtitle]: 最後看你們這個天花板很有巧思捏. (25) [Subtitle]: 美. (26) [Subtitle]: 圓弧感 然後就是燈要這樣子比較不會刺眼 晚上的時候把主燈關起來 有那種氛圍感. (27) [Subtitle]: 那個間照的部分 就會一直卡灰塵 超爽的阿. (28) [Variety]: (潔癖人會注意的 😂).

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in high-visibility orange overalls and later a blue striped shirt; two women, one in a beige hoodie and another in a black crop top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist apartment with white walls, light wood flooring, a curved white sofa, custom cabinets, and stylish decorative lighting on the ceiling.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice opens the track with a very fast speech rate and exaggerated comedic tone, shouting a greeting. Simultaneously, an upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM with a prominent 4/4 drum beat and bright synthesizer chords begins. The room tone is studio-clean and very quiet. (2) A sharp, high-pitched "ding" sound effect occurs exactly as a brand name is mentioned, providing a clear post-production emphasis. The male voice continues its rapid-fire delivery with high vocal arousal, while the BGM maintains its driving rhythm and consistent volume level in the background mix. (3) The sound of several women cheering and laughing loudly ("Yeah!") with high pitch and positive valence fills the mix, creating a celebratory atmosphere. A soft, bubbly "pop" sound effect is layered over their voices. The BGM remains steady with no change in tempo or instrumentation. (4) A distinct "whoosh" transition sound effect marks a shift in the acoustic environment as the man asks a question. His tone becomes slightly more conversational but retains high energy. The background music volume is noticeably lowered (ducked) to ensure his speech remains clear and dominant. (5) Two different female voices provide responses with a moderate speech rate and clear, professional-sounding articulation. Their pitch is naturally higher than the male speaker. A short, crystalline chime sound effect highlights the mention of specific numbers. The BGM continues its bright, rhythmic electronic pulse. (6) Various comedic sound effects, such as a cartoonish "boing" and another "ding," are frequently interspersed between sentences of dialogue. The male narrator’s voice shows significant pitch variability as he describes room features. The BGM and vocals are perfectly balanced with no technical distortion. (7) A burst of collective laughter with moderate loudness occurs as the speakers joke together. The BGM volume swells slightly during this brief pause in dialogue, filling the spectral space. The environmental floor remains minimal, indicating a well-treated indoor space or high-quality directional microphone capture. (8) The track concludes with a final enthusiastic exchange of words between the three speakers, characterized by high arousal and friendly tones. A musical stinger with a final cymbal hit and a synthesizer fade-out brings the audio sequence to a close alongside the sound of lingering laughter.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a house tour vlog celebrating a colleague's acquisition of a new home. It showcases the modern apartment interior and design details through an energetic and comedic lens, typical of influencer lifestyle content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Mention of the brand 'hahababy' and involvement of its director.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Fast-paced, sound-effect-heavy vlog with high social-media engagement style.
